message:
feat(tldr): add meta_skill (ms) to tldr-content.ts

Add MS as a core flywheel tool with skill management features:
- Dual SQLite + Git persistence
- Hybrid search with BM25 + hash embeddings
- MCP integration for AI agents
- Synergies with cm, cass, and bv

Closes: bd-1ega.2.5

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

 {"id":"agentic_coding_flywheel_setup-zumu","title":"Reduce flakiness in production Playwright smoke tests","description":"Playwright production smoke tests used waitForLoadState("networkidle") directly, which can be flaky on pages with long-lived background requests (analytics, etc). Add a helper that waits for domcontentloaded and then attempts networkidle with a short timeout, without failing if the page never becomes fully idle.","status":"closed","priority":3,"issue_type":"bug","created_at":"2025-12-25T06:26:18.185815Z","updated_at":"2025-12-25T06:26:46.273323Z","closed_at":"2025-12-25T06:26:46.273323Z","close_reason":"Implemented waitForPageSettled helper and replaced strict networkidle waits in production smoke tests.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"agentic_coding_flywheel_setup-zumu","depends_on_id":"agentic_coding_flywheel_setup-dvt.6","type":"discovered-from","created_at":"2025-12-25T06:26:18.187139Z","created_by":"jemanuel","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}

 {"id":"agentic_coding_flywheel_setup-zwg3","title":"TASK: Add final completion certificate to onboard","description":"# TASK: Add final completion certificate to onboard

## Context
When user completes all 9 lessons, show a special completion screen.

## Proposed Screen
```
╭─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╮
│                                                             │
│  🏆 ACFS ONBOARDING COMPLETE!                               │
│                                                             │
│  Congratulations! You've completed all 9 lessons.           │
│                                                             │
│  You're now ready to:                                       │
│  • Launch AI agents with cc, cod, gmi                       │
│  • Manage sessions with ntm                                 │
│  • Search code with rg                                      │
│  • Use the full flywheel workflow                           │
│                                                             │
│  Next steps:                                                │
│  • Run 'acfs info' for quick reference                      │
│  • Run 'acfs cheatsheet' for all commands                   │
│  • Start a project with 'ntm new myproject && cc'           │
│                                                             │
│  Completed: $(date +'%Y-%m-%d %H:%M')                       │
│                                                             │
│  Happy coding! 🚀                                            │
│                                                             │
╰─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╯
```

## Implementation

### Store Completion Timestamp
```bash
# In onboard_progress.json
{
  "completed_lessons": [0,1,2,3,4,5,6,7,8],
  "completed_at": "2025-01-15T14:30:00Z"
}
```

### Trigger Condition
Show when:
- User just completed lesson 8 (last)
- OR user runs `onboard` when all lessons complete

### Re-access
User can re-run `onboard` to see certificate again.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Certificate shown on final completion
- [ ] Completion timestamp stored
- [ ] Shows next steps recommendations
- [ ] Accessible by running onboard again
- [ ] Celebration emoji/styling","status":"closed","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-22T19:59:54.304099Z","updated_at":"2025-12-22T20:35:03.037145Z","closed_at":"2025-12-22T20:35:03.037145Z","close_reason":"View Certificate menu option added to onboard. Shows trophy option when all 9 lessons complete.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"agentic_coding_flywheel_setup-zwg3","depends_on_id":"agentic_coding_flywheel_setup-kyhv","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-22T20:00:16.782605Z","created_by":"jemanuel","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
-{"id":"bd-19u2","title":"Fix ms --version failure (meta_skill needs releases)","description":"## Summary
The wizard checks for 'ms' (Meta Skill) command but meta_skill has no GitHub releases, causing ms --version to fail.

## Context
- GitHub Issue #64 reports ms --version fails
- meta_skill repo exists but has 0 releases
- Need to create release workflow for meta_skill

## Requirements
1. Create GitHub Actions release workflow for meta_skill
2. Build and publish binary on tag push
3. Update ACFS wizard to handle missing ms gracefully OR
4. Ensure ms is always available via releases

## Technical Approach
Option A: Create meta_skill release workflow (preferred)
- Add .github/workflows/release.yml to meta_skill repo
- Cross-compile for linux/macos/windows
- Publish to GitHub releases

Option B: Make ACFS wizard more graceful
- Check if ms exists before running --version
- Provide helpful error message with install instructions

## Files to Create/Modify
- /data/projects/meta_skill/.github/workflows/release.yml (if Option A)
- wizard.sh or equivalent in ACFS (if Option B)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] ms --version works after fresh install
- [ ] Wizard doesn't fail on missing ms
- [ ] Clear install instructions if ms missing","status":"in_progress","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","created_at":"2026-01-23T05:03:38.599549578Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-23T06:49:44.188816554Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}

 {"id":"bd-1ega","title":"EPIC: Add New Flywheel Tools & Utilities to ACFS","description":"## Overview

This epic covers adding 16 new tools to the ACFS system:

### First-Class Flywheel Tools (6)
These get FULL integration: manifest, flywheel.ts, tldr, lessons, synergies.

| Tool | Binary | Purpose |
|------|--------|---------|
| **meta_skill** | `ms` | Knowledge management & skill distribution |
| **beads_rust** | `br` | Issue tracking (REPLACES old golang beads `bd`) |
| **destructive_command_guard** | `dcg` | Safety gate for destructive commands (already exists, verify) |
| **remote_compilation_helper** | `rch` | Build acceleration for multi-agent swarms |
| **repo_updater** | `ru` | Repository synchronization (already exists, verify) |
| **wezterm_automata** | `wa` | Multi-agent orchestration & observability |
| **brenner_bot** | TBD | Research session CLI & multi-agent orchestration |

### Utility Tools (10)
These get basic integration: manifest, checksums, optional lessons.

| Tool | Binary | Purpose |
|------|--------|---------|
| **toon_rust** | `tru` | Token-optimized notation format |
| **rust_proxy** | `rust_proxy` | Transparent proxy routing |
| **rano** | `rano` | Network observer for AI CLIs |
| **xf** | `xf` | X (Twitter) archive search |
| **markdown_web_browser** | `mdwb` | Website→Markdown converter |
| **process_triage** | `pt` | Zombie process detector |
| **aadc** | `aadc` | ASCII diagram corrector |
| **source_to_prompt_tui** | `s2p` | Code→LLM prompt generator |
| **coding_agent_usage_tracker** | `caut` | LLM provider usage tracker |

## Critical Actions

### beads_rust (br) Replacing beads (bd)
- Remove ALL references to old golang `beads` package
- Install `br` (beads_rust) instead
- Create alias `bd` → `br` for backward compatibility
- Update all documentation to reference `br`
- Update bv (beads_viewer) to work with `br`

### Integration Points (per tool category)

**Flywheel Tools require:**
1. acfs.manifest.yaml - Full entry with verified_installer
2. checksums.yaml - SHA256 hash for install.sh
3. scripts/lib/doctor.sh - Health check function
4. scripts/lib/update.sh - Version tracking
5. apps/web/lib/flywheel.ts - Tool definition + synergies
6. apps/web/lib/tldr-content.ts - Summary entry
7. acfs/onboard/lessons/ - Tutorial markdown
8. apps/web/components/lessons/ - React component

**Utility Tools require:**
1. acfs.manifest.yaml - Entry with verified_installer
2. checksums.yaml - SHA256 hash
3. scripts/lib/doctor.sh - Optional health check
4. scripts/lib/update.sh - Optional version tracking

## User Decisions
- ✅ Create `bd` → `br` alias for backward compatibility
- ✅ Include ALL utilities by default (not optional)
- ✅ brenner_bot is a first-class flywheel tool

## Success Criteria
1. All 16 tools install via `acfs install`
2. `acfs doctor` shows all tools healthy
3. `acfs update` updates all tools
4. flywheel.ts shows all first-class tools with synergies
5. Old `bd` commands work via alias
6. No references to old golang beads remain","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"feature","created_at":"2026-01-24T23:08:32.752705531Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-24T23:08:32.752705531Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["acfs","epic","flywheel","tools"]}
 {"id":"bd-1ega.1","title":"SUB-EPIC: Replace golang beads (bd) with beads_rust (br) EVERYWHERE","description":"## Critical Migration Task

The original golang beads (`bd`) by Steve Yegge has been completely replaced by beads_rust (`br`), a Rust port with enhanced features.

## Current State Analysis Needed

1. **Where is old beads referenced?**
   - acfs.manifest.yaml - likely has `stack.beads` or `stack.bd`
   - checksums.yaml - may have beads installer hash
   - doctor.sh - may check for `bd` command
   - update.sh - may update `bd`
   - flywheel.ts - may show beads as flywheel tool
   - tldr-content.ts - may describe beads
   - Onboarding lessons - may teach beads
   - README.md - may document beads

2. **What needs to change?**
   - Remove golang beads installation
   - Add beads_rust (br) installation
   - Create alias: `alias bd=br` in acfs.zshrc
   - Update ALL documentation to use `br`
   - Update bv (beads_viewer) compatibility if needed

## beads_rust (br) Capabilities

- SQLite + JSONL hybrid storage
- Full-text search
- Dependency tracking
- Labels and comments
- Agent-first design (--json output)
- ~20K lines Rust vs ~276K golang
- Non-invasive (never touches git automatically)

## Installation

```bash
curl -fsSL "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Dicklesworthstone/beads_rust/main/install.sh?$(date +%s)" | bash
```

## Alias for Backward Compatibility

In `~/.acfs/zsh/acfs.zshrc`:
```bash
# beads_rust replaces golang beads
alias bd=br
```

## Success Criteria

1. `br` command works
2. `bd` command works (via alias)
3. No golang beads installed or referenced
4. bv (beads_viewer) works with br
5. All docs reference br (with bd alias note)
6. Flywheel shows br, not bd","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"feature","created_at":"2026-01-24T23:08:54.122005941Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-25T05:34:00.379273712Z","closed_at":"2026-01-25T05:34:00.379011388Z","close_reason":"All subtasks completed: flywheel.ts updated, lessons updated, onboarding lesson created, React component updated, unit tests created. beads_rust (br) fully integrated with bd alias.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["beads","br","critical","migration"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-1ega.1","depends_on_id":"bd-1ega","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-24T23:08:54.122005941Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}

 {"id":"bd-1ega.2.3","title":"Add meta_skill health check to doctor.sh","description":"## Task

Add check_meta_skill_status() function to scripts/lib/doctor.sh.

## Implementation

```bash
check_meta_skill_status() {
  if command -v ms >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    local version
    version=$(ms --version 2>&1 | head -1)
    log_success "meta_skill: $version"
    return 0
  else
    log_warn "meta_skill (ms) not installed"
    return 1
  fi
}
```

## Acceptance Criteria

1. acfs doctor checks for ms command
2. Shows version when installed
3.  {"id":"bd-1ega.2.9","title":"Create unit tests for meta_skill (ms) integration","description":"## Task

Create unit tests in tests/unit/test_meta_skill_integration.sh

## Test Coverage

1. ms binary exists and is executable
2. ms --version returns valid version
3. ms help command works
4. Basic ms commands function correctly

## Logging Requirements

- Timestamped log file
